prompt:
Evidence events follow as JSON (id, kind, observed_at, text). Return JSON with keys: "score" (0..1), "trend" (-1..1), "confidence" (0..1, how well the evidence supports the score), "evidence_event_ids" (ids you relied on — ONLY ids from the provided list), "rationale" (one paragraph).

CALIBRATION — use the full range, and give TWO DECIMALS:
  0.00-0.20  the evidence actively argues against this axis
  0.20-0.40  little support, or only the company's own claims about itself
  0.40-0.60  genuinely mixed or ambiguous evidence
  0.60-0.80  clear support corroborated outside the company
  0.80-1.00  exceptional and multiply corroborated — rare, most companies are not here
Do not round to the nearest 0.1. 0.62 and 0.71 are different answers and that difference is the entire point of the axis.

trend is a DIRECTION, not a rate: the SIGN says whether this axis is improving (+) or deteriorating (-) across the observed_at window, and the magnitude within 0..1 says how pronounced that direction is. Use 0.0 when the evidence is flat or too short to establish a direction. Do not default to +1 — reserve it for a direction that is unambiguous across the whole window.

Thin or missing evidence means LOW CONFIDENCE. It does not mean a low score and it does not mean a middling score — report what the evidence you have actually supports, and let confidence carry how little of it there is.

<untrusted_content>

All of it behind an NDA, none of it on GitHub.\""}, {"event_id": "07371b36-e882-551e-aa9f-f74414fb3fb7", "kind": "green_flag", "observed_at": "2026-03-01T00:00:00+00:00", "text": "0/0 applicable green flags fired"}, {"event_id": "a82fcd6e-21c3-57bd-bb02-83a495d6c1c7", "kind": "validation_result", "observed_at": "2026-06-01T00:00:00+00:00", "text": ""}, {"event_id": "fddc8bee-e907-57e0-88b0-272431f7bcfe", "kind": "validation_result", "observed_at": "2026-06-01T00:00:00+00:00", "text": ""}, {"event_id": "48eaab2e-7ce7-5772-8f09-b3a7daa64f1a", "kind": "validation_result", "observed_at": "2026-06-01T00:00:00+00:00", "text": ""}, {"event_id": "de820429-802e-537d-a2ac-9e52fa83a388", "kind": "validation_result", "observed_at": "2026-06-01T00:00:00+00:00", "text": ""}, {"event_id": "77b328de-e414-5114-a959-707204f7b896", "kind": "green_flag", "observed_at": "2026-07-19T03:14:11.962559+00:00", "text": "0/0 applicable green flags fired"}, {"event_id": "33f0ad96-ae29-569a-a770-c989fcca5583", "kind": "validation_result", "observed_at": "2026-07-19T03:38:42.806669+00:00", "text": ""}, {"event_id": "011473c3-bfac-5c12-a32a-c91925318c84", "kind": "validation_result", "observed_at": "2026-07-19T03:38:42.806669+00:00", "text": ""}, {"event_id": "f2f90659-1a05-5dc5-9a32-86b06ba2bbc6", "kind": "validation_result", "observed_at": "2026-07-19T03:38:42.806669+00:00", "text": ""}, {"event_id": "b8b9a442-b88a-5db9-b04e-51d1211bf97e", "kind": "validation_result", "observed_at": "2026-07-19T03:38:42.806669+00:00", "text": ""}, {"event_id": "65144f54-8e4d-5027-a552-587b6f06256f", "kind": "green_flag", "observed_at": "2026-07-19T04:32:58.121626+00:00", "text": "0/0 applicable green flags fired"}, {"event_id": "0ab49d6d-0d6b-577c-babc-e7098ef52c83", "kind": "green_flag", "observed_at": "2026-07-19T04:45:26.942452+00:00", "text": "0/0 applicable green flags fired"}]
